sections.paragraph: fem. affliction. Psa 22:25, עֱנוּת עָנִי “the affliction of the afflicted.” Others following the LXX., Vulg., Chald., render it the cry of the afflicted (comp. שַׁוְּעֹו in the other member), but עָנָה is never used of the outcry and lamentation of the wretched. See the root No. 1.
